# services.lighttpd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.lighttpd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.lighttpd.cgit.configText` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Verbatim contents of the cgit runtime configuration file. Documentation (with cgitrc example file) is available in "man cgitrc". Or online: <http://git.zx2c4.com/cgit/tree/cgitrc.5.txt> |
| `services.lighttpd.cgit.enable` | `boolean` | If true, enable cgit (fast web interface for git repositories) as a sub-service in lighttpd. |
| `services.lighttpd.cgit.subdir` | `string` | The subdirectory in which to serve cgit. The web application will be accessible at http://yourserver/${subdir} |
| `services.lighttpd.collectd.collectionCgi` | `absolute path` | Path to collection.cgi script from (collectd sources)/contrib/collection.cgi This option allows to use a customized version |
| `services.lighttpd.collectd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable collectd subservice accessible at http://yourserver/collectd. |
| `services.lighttpd.configText` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Overridable config file contents to use for lighttpd. By default, use the contents automatically generated by NixOS. |
| `services.lighttpd.document-root` | `absolute path` | Document-root of the web server. Must be readable by the "lighttpd" user. |
| `services.lighttpd.enable` | `boolean` | Enable the lighttpd web server. |
| `services.lighttpd.enableModules` | `list of string` | List of lighttpd modules to enable. Sub-services take care of enabling modules as needed, so this option is mainly for when you want to add custom stuff to {option}`services.lighttpd.extraConfig` that depends on a certain module. |
| `services.lighttpd.enableUpstreamMimeTypes` | `boolean` | Whether to include the list of mime types bundled with lighttpd (upstream). If you disable this, no mime types will be added by NixOS and you will have to add your own mime types in {option}`services.lighttpd.extraConfig`. |
| `services.lighttpd.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | These configuration lines will be appended to the generated lighttpd config file. Note that this mechanism does not work when the manual {option}`configText` option is used. |
| `services.lighttpd.gitweb.enable` | `boolean` | If true, enable gitweb in lighttpd. Access it at http://yourserver/gitweb |
| `services.lighttpd.mod_status` | `boolean` | Show server status overview at /server-status, statistics at /server-statistics and list of loaded modules at /server-config. |
| `services.lighttpd.mod_userdir` | `boolean` | If true, requests in the form /~user/page.html are rewritten to take the file public_html/page.html from the home directory of the user. |
| `services.lighttpd.package` | `package` | The lighttpd package to use. |
| `services.lighttpd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port number for lighttpd to bind to. |
